title: Monsieur
writer: Claude Gével, Georges Darrier, Pascal Jardin
actors: Jean Gabin, Liselotte Pulver, Mireille Darc
plot: Left heartbroken by the death of his beloved wife, a rich banker tries to commit suicide. When he learns from his former maid that his wife was unfaithful he fakes his own death and comes back under a new identity
